description: SDK-only Infisical packaging with local vault, caching, CLI commands, and config-based adapter selection

specs.description: LocalVault creates an AES-256-GCM encrypted vault file
specs.then: A JSON file is written with salt, iv, tag, data (all hex-encoded), kdf='pbkdf2', kdfIterations=600000

specs.given: A vault file created with password 'test-pw' containing secret FOO=bar
specs.when: resolveSecret('FOO') is called with the same password

specs.given: A vault file created with password 'correct-pw'
specs.then: Throws an error (GCM auth tag verification fails)

domain_conventions.security: GCM auth tag detects tampered or wrongly-decrypted data

specs.description: LocalVault returns error for missing keys
specs.given: A vault with secrets A and B
specs.then: Returns { ok: false, error: containing 'not found' }

specs.when: addSecret('NEW_KEY', 'new-value') is called, then a fresh adapter reads the vault

specs.description: Cache returns cached value within TTL
specs.given: Inner adapter resolves KEY=val1, cache TTL is 5 minutes
specs.when: resolveSecret('KEY') is called twice within 5 minutes
specs.then: Inner adapter is called once, second call returns cached val1

specs.given: Inner adapter resolves KEY=val1, cache TTL is 100ms
specs.when: resolveSecret('KEY') is called, then after 150ms called again (inner now returns val2)
specs.then: Second call returns val2 (cache expired, inner re-fetched)

specs.description: Cache keys are scoped by environment and path
specs.given: Inner adapter returns different values for same key in different environments
specs.then: Both calls hit inner adapter (different cache keys), return different values

specs.description: Cache does not cache failed lookups
specs.given: Inner adapter returns { ok: false } for KEY
specs.when: resolveSecret('KEY') is called, then inner is fixed to return { ok: true, value: 'fixed' }, then called again
specs.then: Second call returns { ok: true, value: 'fixed' } (failure was not cached)

specs.given: .hex/secrets.json exists with backend='infisical' and valid infisical config
specs.then: Returns an InfisicalAdapter (or CachingSecretsAdapter wrapping one)

specs.description: Missing config file falls back to EnvSecretsAdapter
Invalid config file does not crash — falls back gracefully
specs.then: Logs warning to stderr, returns EnvSecretsAdapter (not a crash)

specs.description: hex secrets status reports backend type and health
specs.given: Secrets configured with env-var backend (no config file)

specs.description: hex secrets list shows keys without values
specs.then: Output contains key names but NEVER contains secret values

domain_conventions.security: Secret values must never appear in CLI output for list command

specs.description: Composition root wires secrets into AppContext
specs.then: ctx.secrets is an ISecretsPort instance (never null, always at least EnvSecretsAdapter)

specs.description: LLM adapter resolves API key from secrets when env var missing
specs.given: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not in process.env, but Infisical has it
specs.then: LLM adapter is created with the key from Infisical, llm is not null
